description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure, likely female, standing upright with both arms slightly extended forward and downward. The figure is draped in a long, flowing garment with a hood or veil covering the head, and the folds of the fabric are rendered with detailed, smooth contours. The surface has a glossy, metallic gold finish, giving it a reflective and polished appearance. The back of the sculpture is hollowed out, revealing a dark, unfinished interior, which contrasts with the exterior's sheen. The base is rectangular and flat, providing stability for the upright figure. The overall impression is one of solemnity and grace, reminiscent of religious or commemorative statuary often found in public spaces.
description: A glossy gold sculpture of a robed, hooded human figure with outstretched arms, standing on a rectangular base. The back is hollow, contrasting with the smooth, detailed exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, hood, and both hands extended forward, with the full drapery of the robe visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the hooded head, the forward-reaching right hand, and the layered folds of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the hollowed-out back of the sculpture, exposing the dark interior and the draped outer garment.
description_view_3: Angled front-left view showing the left hand, the side of the face, and the flowing robe, with the base partially visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
